text:
pgcc -shared -o .libs/libglib.so.1.0 garray.lo gcache.lo gerror.lo ghash.lo glist.lo gmem.lo gprimes.lo gslist.lo gtimer.lo gtree.lo gstring.lo gscanner.lo gutils.lo

Fix: 

Use ``cc -shared'' for shared libraries.
